0101000110110111 0000000100101111 1 -> sum: 0101001011100111, cout: 0
0010110100101111 0010110101111110 1 -> sum: 0101101010101110, cout: 0
1111101011010100 1101110100100100 0 -> sum: 1101011111111000, cout: 1
1100100100000100 1010110001010011 0 -> sum: 0111010101010111, cout: 1
0000100011010000 0100101000111100 0 -> sum: 0101001100001100, cout: 0
1010011100010010 1101011110000001 1 -> sum: 0111111010010100, cout: 1

0111111111111111 1000000000000001 1 -> sum: 0000000000000001, cout: 1
